notes: Utility-overlay archetype: stateless, positional tooltip. Role-less by design — variants are purely semantic colors (default/light/danger/warning/info/success) for visual feedback, not identity.
Three SIZES (small/base/large) — categorical, not the 10-density ladder. Sizes drive padding, gap, font-size, max-width, icon-size.
Placement (top/bottom/left/right) is a runtime CSS attribute, not a variant — driven by data-placement.
State machine: hidden (opacity:0, pointer-events:none) ↔ visible (opacity:1, pointer-events:auto). Driven by data-state.
Trigger uses aria-describedby → tooltip id. Tooltip has role='tooltip'. Screen readers announce on focus.
Portal: positioned absolutely, z-index:1000, no tap targets (pointer-events:none). Motion: fade + scale-in (0.96→1).
